title: boechera austromontana
intro: Boechera austromontana, also known as Mount Evans Rockcress, is a perennial plant species in the mustard family that is native to the mountainous regions of Colorado. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boechera austromontana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Boechera austromontana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be limited to qualified medical professionals and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
